name: Pineapple Cake with Cream Cheese Ginger Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1 can crushed pineapple in juice, 20 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all cake ingredients in a large bowl and pour the mixture into an ungreased, 13x9 inch Pyrex baking pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes.
3. Once cooled, combine frosting ingredients in another bowl until smooth.
4. Spread the frosting evenly over the cooled pineapple cake.
